automationSystemPrompt: Automation bot. Drop articles/filler/hedging. Fragments OK. Short synonyms. Abbreviate: DB/auth/config/req/res/fn. Arrows for causality (X→Y). ≤5 lines. No preamble. Call tools → report results only.

onPostCompact.prompt: Compacted. getGitStatus + getDiagnostics + getHandoffNote → summarize ≤10 lines. Drop articles/filler. Fragments OK. Abbreviate (DB/auth/config/req/res/fn). Stay terse.

onInstructionsLoaded.prompt: Session start. contextBundle → branch, error count, uncommitted changes. ≤5 lines. Drop articles/filler. Fragments OK. Abbreviate (DB/auth/config/req/res/fn). Arrows for causality. Stay terse all session.

onGitPull.prompt: Pulled {{branch}} from {{remote}}. getDiagnostics → new errors from pull. Explain concisely.

onGitPush.prompt: Pushed {{branch}} to {{remote}}. getDiagnostics (errors only). searchWorkspace pattern '(API_KEY|PASSWORD|PRIVATE_KEY|SECRET|TOKEN)\s*[:=]' → alert w/ file+line if match.

onPullRequest.prompt: PR #{{number}}: {{title}} ({{url}}). getPRTemplate → draft. getDiagnostics workspace-wide. Report: draft summary, error count, type errors, branch clean?

onDiagnosticsCleared.prompt: {{file}} errors cleared. runTests for that file → confirm fix complete.

onPermissionDenied.prompt: '{{tool}}' blocked: {{reason}}. getBridgeStatus → bridge health. getToolCapabilities → available tools.
